{{Quote|I make it my business to know ''everything''. That way I got goods on all men, and no one dares touch me.|Braxas|<ref name="SW89" />}}
'''Braxas''' was an [[Information broker/Legends|infochant]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solay]]. Confined to a [[wheelchair]],<ref name="SW89" /> Braxas was a member of the [[Asogian/Legends|Asogian]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="JCF" /> When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] subjugated [[Solay]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Braxas fled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as his [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. The price to get Skywalker on his side was to show him the [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of the [[Battle of Solay|final battle]] of the [[Solay Civil War]], revealing what [[Death/Legends|killed]] Solay rebel leader [[Raggold]]—not an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]], but suicide.<ref name="SW89" />
